mapper.select: SELECT PROGRAM_ID AS programId , SESSION_NO AS sessionNo , DAY_TYPE AS dayType , EVENT_TIME AS eventTime , ENABLED AS enabled FROM SESSION_TEMPLATE WHERE PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND DAY_TYPE = #{dayType} ORDER BY SESSION_NO

SELECT PT.PROGRAM_ID AS programId , PT.SESSION_NO AS sessionNo , PT.TYPE_ID AS typeId , TT.TYPE_NM AS typeNm , PT.DAY_TYPE AS dayType , PT.PRICE AS price FROM PRICE_TEMPLATE PT JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON PT.TYPE_ID = TT.TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN PROGRAM_TICKET_TYPE PTT ON PT.PROGRAM_ID = PTT.PROGRAM_ID AND PT.TYPE_ID = PTT.TYPE_ID WHERE PT.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND PT.DAY_TYPE = #{dayType} ORDER BY PT.SESSION_NO, PTT.SORT_ORDER
